MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RANDALL A. BLACKBURN'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER VACATING AMENDED DEFAULT. Appearances: John J. Jackman of East 17th St. Law Group (818.268.8243) for defendant and moving party; Marcus Merchasin (678.2700) and Steven Helfand (397.0007) for plaintiff and responding party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Defendant makes a sufficient showing of excusable neglect and the law favors adjudicating cases on their merits. Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SUSAN SALISBURY MOTION TO TRANSFER FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO SUPERIOR COURT OF LOS ANGELES COUNTY. Appearances: Steven F. Helfand, Esq. of Helfand Law Offices (415) 397-0007 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiffs; & Marcus D. Merchasin, Esq. Law Offices of Marcus D. Merchasin, (415) 678-2700 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiffs; Stephen M. Lawniczak, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP (415) 986-5900, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to transfer denied, without prejudice to further motion being brought after answer is filed. Both requests for sanctions denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
